title: placement_init
description: Pre-computed scale and placement values produced by initialize_placement.py. Every value is derived from parts.json (world_dims, size_fraction, position_in_parent, hinge_side, slide_axis, open_angle_deg, pullout_fraction). Used to build iterations/001/assembly.json.

root_world_dims.description: [width_m, depth_m, height_m] real-world size of the root part, in metres.

root_world_center.description: World-space centre of the root part. Typically [0, 0, height/2] (root sits on world floor at origin).

root_scale.description: root_scale[axis] = root_world_dims[axis] / raw_root_size[axis]. Use directly as the root link's scale in assembly.json.

config_used.description: Provenance for this file (e.g. source parts.json and root_world_dims used).

parts.description: Placement hints for every non-root part. Nested children are under each entry's 'children' key.

parent_effective_scale.description: The product of all ancestor scales along each axis. child_scale is applied on top of this.

estimated_world_dims.description: [W, D, H] in metres. Derived from size_fraction × parent_world_dims. Verify against source image; recompute child_scale if you change this.

raw_size.description: Raw GLB bounding-box size in Blender units (≈ metres) before any scale is applied.

child_scale.description: child_scale[axis] = estimated_world_dims[axis] / (parent_effective_scale[axis] × raw_size[axis]). Use this directly as scale in assembly.json. Recompute if you change estimated_world_dims.

world_center.description: World-space centre of this part in its closed/default pose.

origin_xyz.description: origin.xyz for assembly.json in PARENT LOCAL (unscaled) space.

rpy_deg.description: origin.rpy_deg for assembly.json. [0,0,0] for closed pose.

open_pose.description: Suggested open/extended pose. Only present for revolute and prismatic joints.

children.description: Hints for grandchildren (children of this part), same schema recursively.
